subcodes.first_line: O Dawud! The All-Loving Lord proclaimeth in the Perspicuous Book that which hath been sent down through the Most Exalted Pen as a stronghold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا داود رب ودود میفرماید در کتاب مبین از قلم اعلی نازل شده آنچه که حصنی است
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @unity; oneness of humanity, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
